text.title: django-pytest-integration Decision Tree
text.summary: Per endpoint: required test cases. Per service: db_fixture choice.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the endpoint public (no authentication required)?

branch.conclusion: test_cases excludes "anonymous-401". Must include happy-200, validation-400, not-found-404 where applicable.
test_cases MUST include anonymous-401, wrong-perm-403, cross-user-403, happy-200/201, plus validation-400 and not-found-404 where applicable.
test_cases MUST include anonymous-401, wrong-perm-403, happy-200/201, validation-400.

branch.question: Does the service rely on transaction.on_commit / signals / select_for_update?

branch.conclusion: uses_transactional_db=true. Tests assert on post-commit behaviour.
uses_transactional_db=false. Default db fixture is sufficient.

text.example: endpoint=GET /api/v1/invoices/{id}/, non-public, user-owned q-endpoint-public -> false q-resource-ownership -> true => conclusion r3: test_cases include anonymous-401, cross-user-403, happy-200, not-found-404.
